2026-02-01.name: AI Model Comparator
2026-02-01.description: Compare major AI language models, explore their evolution, and understand key differences in capabilities and architecture.

2026-02-02.name: AI Attention Mechanism Explorer
2026-02-02.description: An interactive educational tool that explains how attention mechanisms work in transformer architectures. Visualize attention weights, understand self-attention computation, and explore Q/K/V dynamics.

2026-02-03.name: AI Ethics Simulator
2026-02-03.description: Explore ethical dilemmas in AI development. Apply philosophical frameworks (utilitarian, deontological, virtue ethics, justice) to real-world scenarios including bias, autonomous vehicles, predictive policing, and medical triage. Engage with stakeholder perspectives and access ethical guidelines.

2026-02-04.name: AI Safety & Alignment Explorer
2026-02-04.description: Explore AI safety research, alignment techniques, and control problems. Learn about RLHF, Constitutional AI, scalable oversight, and risk assessment. Features interactive scenarios, visualizations, and quizzes.
